task_completion.description: Create a new style named 'area_classification' in the 'ne' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer web interface, the Styles list or Style Editor page shows a style named 'area_classification' assigned to the workspace 'ne'.

task_completion.description: Configure SLD rule for features with an area less than 15.0 square degrees to have a red fill.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SLD code editor shows an OGC filter using '<ogc:Function name="area">', a '<ogc:PropertyIsLessThan>' operator with a literal value of '15.0', and a PolygonSymbolizer with a fill color of '#FF0000'.

task_completion.description: Configure SLD rule for features with an area greater than or equal to 15.0 square degrees to have a gray fill.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SLD code editor shows an OGC filter using '<ogc:Function name="area">', a '<ogc:PropertyIsGreaterThanOrEqualTo>' operator with a literal value of '15.0', and a PolygonSymbolizer with a fill color of '#AAAAAA'.

task_completion.description: Set 'area_classification' as the default style for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer Edit Layer page for 'ne_countries', under the Publishing tab, the Default Style dropdown is set to 'ne:area_classification'.

task_completion.description: Export an 800x400 PNG map preview of the global extent to /home/ga/area_map.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or image viewer shows a file named 'area_map.png' in the '/home/ga/' directory. The image displays a world map where smaller countries are colored red and larger countries are colored gray.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web interface to create and apply the style.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the GeoServer web administration GUI (e.g., Styles page, Layer Publishing page) rather than exclusively using terminal curl commands to interact with the REST API.

integrity.description: The agent actually inputted the SLD code into the GeoServer style editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SLD XML code present inside the GeoServer style editor text area.

integrity.description: The exported map image is generated from GeoServer rather than being a downloaded or fabricated image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using GeoServer's Layer Preview, WMS request URL, or a terminal command (like curl/wget) querying the local GeoServer instance to generate and save the PNG file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected style name is 'area_classification' within the 'ne' workspace. The SLD must use the OGC function 'area' to calculate geometry area dynamically. The threshold is 15.0 (square degrees). Features < 15.0 must be colored red (#FF0000). Features >= 15.0 must be colored gray (#AAAAAA). The layer to style is 'ne:ne_countries'. The final output must be an 800x400 PNG saved to '/home/ga/area_map.png'.
